name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-10
title: Consolidate repo-permissions (lock/unlock) into /rabbit-config as a new 'permissions' subcommand; remove standalone skill
description:
repo-permissions.py (lock|unlock) should not be a standalone skill or command. It belongs as a subcommand of /rabbit-config since it is a project configuration action — exactly what rabbit-config owns.

Changes:
1. Add 'permissions lock' and 'permissions unlock' subcommands to the rabbit-config command .md and its backing script. Clear user guide in the command: what lock/unlock does, when to run each, that lock runs on archive/ and test/.
2. Remove .claude/features/rabbit-cage/skills/repo-permissions/ (source skill).
3. Remove .claude/skills/repo-permissions/ (deployed skill).
4. Remove the skills/repo-permissions/SKILL.md copy-file entry from build-contract.json.
5. The underlying repo-permissions.py script stays in rabbit-cage/scripts/ — rabbit-config just delegates to it.

Note: this item tracks the consolidation only. The broader drift-protection audit for all .claude/ surface artifacts is tracked in RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-9.

history.note: Added permissions lock|unlock subcommand to /rabbit-config. Removed standalone repo-permissions skill and its build-contract.json entry. Underlying script repo-permissions.py unchanged.
